name: Eat his cum front of wife
description:
At dinner, Chad goes to kitchen w/ yo wife and cums into yo wife's mouth. She spits it in a cup. Chad+yo wife return to the dinner table; Chad says it is mayonnaise, insists you dip french fries into it at the dinner table and eat the "mayonnaise".

Your wife is conflicted about going along with Chad's cruel joke, but she doesn't wanna expose Chad's trick cuz she fears displeasing him.
creator: VRCat
